voter.title: Register to Vote
voter.description: Submit your registration form to the local election office or online portal.
voter.missed: You cannot vote in this election

voter.title: Receive Poll Card
voter.description: A poll card will be sent to your registered address with details of your polling station.

candidate.title: File Nomination
candidate.description: Submit your nomination papers with the required signatures and deposit.

officer.title: Set Up Polling Stations
officer.description: Identify and prepare locations for polling stations.
